description: Talbot attends the Confederacy's gathering. He interrupts centuries of protocol by demanding a seat at their table, touting his unique status as gravitonium's vessel. The Confederacy resists, citing tradition, but Talbot murders a member with his powers, shocking them. This act opens up a spot for him, astonishing those present, especially the Kree elder Taryan of House Kasius.

transcript.line: The six all stand present. Let us unite, under the banner of one true Confederacy.
This man hails from Earth. He has come to renegotiate terms of their protection.
The terms have already been set. Why would we even entertain such derangement?
Because you guys have been dealing with a bunch of weak amateurs. It's time you met Earth's mightiest hero. Me.
